creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
roam        2007-12-25 06:00:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/vpopmail        Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    mail/vpopmail/files  patch-config.h.in patch-configure 
                         patch-vdelivermail.c patch-vmysql.c 
                         patch-vpgsql.c patch-vpopmail.c 
  Added files:
    mail/vpopmail/files  patch-vlist.c patch-vlistlib.c 
                         patch-vpalias.c patch-vutil.c 
  Log:
  Update the vpopmail port to version 5.4.26 with a lot of changes and fixes:
  - add the WITH_SPAMFOLDER knob from Alex Dupre's PR;
  - fix lots of bugs in the new vlist code;
  - fix a couple of bugs in MySQL's "valias -n" implementation;
  - actually implement "valias -n" for PostgreSQL;
  - fix a couple of directory descriptor leaks and other buglets.
  
  PR:             117321 (the WITH_SPAMFOLDER knob)
  Submitted by:   ale
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.71      +5 -1      ports/mail/vpopmail/Makefile
  1.29      +3 -3      ports/mail/vpopmail/distinfo

  1.1       +49 -0     ports/mail/vpopmail/files/patch-vutil.c (new)
